name: Punk
description: Bandit class mod for Krieg the Psycho, built around The Better Half, Smaller, Lighter, Faster, Annoyed Android.
notes: All Punk variants reduce magazine size by at least 1 round. This can drop a weapon to 0 magazine capacity, making some guns unusable, including Infinity, Longrider, Striker, and Coach Gun. The item card may show an incorrect fire rate value.

special.description: At max level, Punk provides +46% fire rate and -29% magazine size.
